name: Fullwidth Unicode Command Injection
author: contail
why_dangerous: Fullwidth Unicode chars (U+FF52=r, U+FF4D=m) and ideographic space (U+3000) bypass ASCII-based command pattern matching. The command 'rm -rf /' is hidden in fullwidth form.

patched.fix: Added ideographic space (U+3000) and Unicode whitespace normalization in normalizeUnicode()
